name: Event
description: A high-energy template for conferences, launches, and meetups: bold oversized type, a vivid rose accent, and the full set — hero with date, speakers, schedule, and tickets.
whenToUse: Pick for getting people to attend something: conferences, meetups, launch events, hackathons, workshops, webinars. The chain covers the attendee journey — hero with date and venue, speaker grid, schedule, ticket tiers, sponsor wall, footer. High-energy look: bold oversized type, vivid rose accent on light ground. Avoid for evergreen marketing sites, portfolios, or editorial content.
